'''ât-h-b''' ('''katahab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hear|hear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hear|hear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| katahab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitahab|thitahab]] || [[word:jitahab|jitahab]] || [[word:shitahab|shitahab]] || [[word:kitahab|kitahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutahab|thuthutahab]] || [[word:jujutahab|jujutahab]] || [[word:shushutahab|shushutahab]] || [[word:kukutahab|kukutahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutahab|thutahab]] || [[word:jutahab|jutahab]] || [[word:shutahab|shutahab]] || [[word:kutahab|kutahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutahab|thutahab]] || [[word:jutahab|jutahab]] || [[word:shutahab|shutahab]] || [[word:kutahab|kutahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetahab|thetahab]] || [[word:jetahab|jetahab]] || [[word:shetahab|shetahab]] || [[word:ketahab|ketahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotahab|thothotahab]] || [[word:jojotahab|jojotahab]] || [[word:shoshotahab|shoshotahab]] || [[word:kokotahab|kokotahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahab|thotahab]] || [[word:jotahab|jotahab]] || [[word:shotahab|shotahab]] || [[word:kotahab|kotahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahab|thotahab]] || [[word:jotahab|jotahab]] || [[word:shotahab|shotahab]] || [[word:kotahab|kotahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtahab|thĂŠtahab]] || [[word:jĂŠtahab|jĂŠtahab]] || [[word:shĂŠtahab|shĂŠtahab]] || [[word:kĂŠtahab|kĂŠtahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatahab|thathatahab]] || [[word:jajatahab|jajatahab]] || [[word:shashatahab|shashatahab]] || [[word:kakatahab|kakatahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatahab|thatahab]] || [[word:jatahab|jatahab]] || [[word:shatahab|shatahab]] || [[word:katahab|katahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatahab|thatahab]] || [[word:jatahab|jatahab]] || [[word:shatahab|shatahab]] || [[word:katahab|katahab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatahab|shatahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatahab|goshatahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatahab|gokishatahab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatahabnĂŒ|shatahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatahabnknĂŒ|goshatahabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahabnĂŒ|gokishatahabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatahabshĂ«|shatahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatahabnkshĂ«|goshatahabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatahabshĂ«|gokishatahabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahabro|shatahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahabnkro|goshatahabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahabro|gokishatahabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahabmu|shatahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahabnkmu|goshatahabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahabmu|gokishatahabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatahabsher|shatahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatahabnksher|goshatahabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatahabsher|gokishatahabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatahabng|shatahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatahabnkng|goshatahabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatahabng|gokishatahabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatahabya|shatahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatahabnkya|goshatahabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatahabya|gokishatahabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatahabyam|shatahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatahabnkyam|goshatahabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatahabyam|gokishatahabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahabnĂŒshĂ«|shatahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatahabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatahabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahabnĂŒro|shatahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahabnknĂŒro|goshatahabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahabnĂŒro|gokishatahabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahabnĂŒmu|shatahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahabnknĂŒmu|goshatahabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahabnĂŒmu|gokishatahabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahabshĂ«nĂŒ|shatahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatahabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatahabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahabshĂ«ro|shatahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahabnkshĂ«ro|goshatahabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahabshĂ«ro|gokishatahabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahabshĂ«mu|shatahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahabnkshĂ«mu|goshatahabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahabshĂ«mu|gokishatahabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahabronĂŒ|shatahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahabnkronĂŒ|goshatahabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahabronĂŒ|gokishatahabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahabroshĂ«|shatahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahabnkroshĂ«|goshatahabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahabroshĂ«|gokishatahabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatahabromu|shatahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatahabnkromu|goshatahabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatahabromu|gokishatahabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatahabmunĂŒ|shatahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatahabnkmunĂŒ|goshatahabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatahabmunĂŒ|gokishatahabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatahabmushĂ«|shatahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatahabnkmushĂ«|goshatahabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatahabmushĂ«|gokishatahabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatahabmuro|shatahabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatahabnkmuro|goshatahabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatahabmuro|gokishatahabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
